title: tephrosia persica
intro: Tephrosia persica, also known as Persian milk pea or Persian bean, is a flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Tephrosia persica is often used as a powder or extract, and can be found in teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its usage and benefits may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
